_comment: DNS Looking Glass configuration file. Copy this to dnslg-config.json (in the webserver/ directory) and edit. The live config file is gitignored and will never be committed.

api._comment: Default TCP port used to reach all remote Go API nodes. Can be overridden per node.

nameservers._comment: Each group has a display name, an optional list of CIDR prefixes that restrict visibility to matching client IPs, and a map of node items keyed by a short tag string.
nameservers.name: Global Nodes
prefixes: _comment: Remove this _comment key and the entries below to make this group visible to all clients.

node-fra.name: Frankfurt
node-fra._comment: Override the global API port for this specific node.

nameservers._comment: A restricted group — only visible to clients whose IPs fall within the listed CIDR prefixes. Omit 'prefixes' entirely to make a group visible to all.
nameservers.name: Internal Nodes

defaults._comment: Tag of the node pre-selected on page load. Must match a key in one of the items maps.
defaults._comment2: Default QTYPE selected in the dropdown.

custom._comment: Set enabled to true to show a free-text nameserver input field in the UI (Specify IP mode target). When false, users can still use Specify IP mode but cannot enter arbitrary targets — reserved for future per-group control.
